This game is great grinding to get different missions or trying not to get seen when you were heard. I would say this game is 10x better with friends. Other than that I really like this game

reviews.review_title: Fun, but it needs some tweaks.
reviews.review_description: I got this game a while ago. My friend saw it on Tiktok and then he really wanted to play this game WITH me. This game is really 100x better with friends. But, after a while the game starts to feel very repetitive. You go in, steal a bunch of stuff, drag it to your escape vehicle ￼, and the get out of there. After doing that for a while you will get the best escape ￼vehicle. Then there is nothing new to do. Sure, you could max out all of the different perk choices. But that means that you will do THE EXACT SAME thing AGAIN. This game really needs some more special, either missions or just fun things to use in those missions. Maybe you could add some sort of rebirth system, where you can get new perks in the different classes. Or to be able to unlock a whole NEW class. Or maybe you could add a field of view for the NPC’s, wich makes it so that they dont just immediately ￼see you and start running and alerting the cops.If something like that gets added this game will 100% be a 5 star game. Me and my friend really enjoyed this game when we could still unlock new stuff. Now we never play it, because we got EVERYTHING in the game. Please devs add new stuff. I really like your game and i want to still like playing it.
Add please Hungarian subtitles And add 5 star! Please

I was gifted this game and honestly i feel bad they paid for it twice cuz the game plays like trash there is no stealth to the game. You are either in the enemy sight or youre not, lighting makes no difference. Which raises the question whats the point of the hacker/breaker switches. Is it just to make you feel like the nvgs or flashlight were worth buying. And there is the ever frustrating mechanic of knocking people out, it requires a hammer without the upgraded strong man perk. Im not sure about you guys but i dont think id wake up faster after each repeated blow to the head from a hammer. There a lot more issues but honestly im not sure most people made it this for so im just going to stop.
This game is amazing and just super fun I truly recommend

I’m writing this after a year I got the game. This game was AWESOME!￼ But once I got every thing and maxed out classes is was not fun anymore. Please keep updating! The museum update was wonderful! Thanks for this game!

It’s a Perfect Game but I would like some improvements for example a Glass cutter Tool that you could use to silently Enter trougth Windows 

And I Would Like some bug fixes for example that a Big item doesn’t get Stuck when I try to Move It trougth a Window or a Door ￼￼￼
Best robbery game ive ever played. Recommend with friends. Needs more updates tho then it will be even better

reviews.review_title: I would recommend to get this game
reviews.review_description: This game is awesome and I like how you have to be sneaky and can get caught. Also you can have different roles like being a really sneaky one, a strong guy, and a hacker to take out the cameras and stuff. I would definitely get this game if I was you.

reviews.review_title: I love this game, but I have a recommend

Love your game by the way that includes what friends all my friends love this game

I’m gonna put it simply, this game SUCKS. I got this game one day when a friend forced me to, and I honestly was never really a big fan.

Basically, this game is very unpolished, riddled with small game-breaking bugs and glitches, and barely updates, like ever. Not even a few mini-updates or bug fixes every once in a while, and believe me, this game NEEDS those bug fixes. I can wait for an update, but i’m not gonna play your buggy mess of a game as I wait. This game also feels really bland. There’s barely anything to do, the game’s concept gets pretty stale after a while, and for a 20$ game I really expect better graphics than THAT. I’m not trying to discourage anyone from buying this game, it’s just a game that I DON’T RECOMMEND. If you want to spend 20$ on a VR game, spend it on something worth your time. And for the developer, this game (as I stated before) is NOT worth 20$. Please consider making the price lower, like 5$, as that’s what I feel like this game is worth. Honestly, if you just polished up the game a bit and lowered the price, the game would be way better. Thank you for reading my review.
Peak

As a meta quest 1 player, I was surprised to see such a game available for my headset
Of course, I'm not able to play online but as a single player, this game is still so good. The levels are really fun to play. I also love all the items you can buy especially the lamp. If the game developer is reading this I love your game and by the way check out his YouTube.

When I first go the game I thought that it was slightly boring because it just got lonely but when my friend started play with me, my opinion completely changed! It went from a kinda empty game to a game where we would just make jokes  and mess with the npcs. The gadgets work as intended and the roles add some needed flavor. The one problem is that I wish you were able to take some of the bigger stuff in the maps without having to use the strength character. Also the npcs are kinda wacky. Not complaining about that tho because it's funny to use the invisible lamp thing and just "dissappear" from their radar. Overall a great game to play with friends or alone if your ok with it being a little lonely.  8.5/10

Just break down the door SWAT style dome the first dude you seem and load em onto your getaway vehicle.

Good

This game is an absolute gem. The game always has something to grind for whether its a new outfit, a new perk, a new item to rob houses with, a new getaway vehicle or even a new heist. The heists range from abandoned houses to banks and even casinos. Even if the game has some bugs, they are being fixed by the developer (Also most of the bugs are sometimes quite funny) You can really steal a whole lot, from toilets to UFO's, this game has it all. The Break-In is really worth really penny, especially with friends

5/5 stars
